((continuity (type . residual) (index . 1)) (x-velocity (type . residual) (index . 2)) (y-velocity (type . residual) (index . 3)) (z-velocity (type . residual) (index . 4)) (energy (type . residual) (index . 5)) (k (type . residual) (index . 6)) (omega (type . residual) (index . 7)) (inlet-mass-flow-rate (index . 1) (type . surface) (quantity .
